slice: Normalize GitHub Actions artifact-list metadata for one exact workflow run before release-packet verification.

verification.route: isolated Node 22-compatible test execution against byte-identical pre-commit files, followed by fetch-back from commit 6019a7acdd17eed04c9a7c6b339ffb3427091a4c
covered: mutable or invalid commit identity rejected

claim_boundary: This slice validates and normalizes GitHub artifact-list metadata only. It does not prove artifact bytes, workflow success, credentials, authorization, Cloudflare deployment, DNS, served identity, or scientific truth.
rollback: Revert commits b0de8a41309d746c0cac7d9ea92478e201ac9fcf and 6019a7acdd17eed04c9a7c6b339ffb3427091a4c; prior release-packet verifier remains intact.
